businessBackground: Dynacor operates a **fee-based ASM (artisanal/small-scale mining) gold-ore processing model**: it purchases ore from government-licensed Peruvian ASM miners and processes it at its wholly-owned Chala mill, selling refined gold doré bars and silver pellets internationally at market prices. The earnings driver is the **cash gross operating margin per AuEq oz** — which expands when gold prices rise (because ASM ore-purchase pricing lags spot) and contracts when gold falls. Zero exploration capex, no reserve-replacement risk, no mine-development cycle.
catalysts: Q2-2026 (~2 months): Senegal 50-tpd pilot — first ore
Each quarterly print: Sales vs $530-580M guide / NI vs $22-26M guide
